# Sohrab Zia

> Web & mobile UI/UX designer based in Kuwait with 10+ years of experience crafting user-centered, responsive interfaces for web and mobile products. Available for freelance work and collaborations worldwide.

## About

Sohrab Zia (also written Soharab Zia) is a UI/UX and product designer specializing in web and mobile interface design. Work spans user experience design, user interface design, design systems, prototyping, and front-end implementation. Based in Kuwait, working with clients worldwide.

- Role: Web & Mobile UI/UX Designer
- Location: Kuwait (remote / worldwide)
- Experience: 10+ years, 50+ projects
- Focus: UI design, UX design, web design, mobile app design, design systems, responsive interfaces
- Tools: Figma, React, and a broad modern design + front-end toolkit

## Work

- Selected projects and case studies: https://sohrabzia.github.io/ (see "Selected work")
- Individual project pages: https://sohrabzia.github.io/project/{id}
